name: Braintree
description: Braintree is a full-stack payment gateway by PayPal. It enables you to accept credit cards, PayPal, Venmo, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. The GraphQL API handles transactions, customer management, vault storage, payment method tokenization, and dispute handling.

auth.note: Uses Basic auth with base64(public_key:private_key). All operations use the GraphQL endpoint at /graphql. Include Braintree-Version header.

capabilities.name: transactions_charge
capabilities.description: Charge a payment method to create a sale transaction.

capabilities.name: transactions_authorize
capabilities.description: Authorize a payment without capturing funds.

capabilities.name: transactions_capture
capabilities.description: Capture an authorized transaction to settle funds.

capabilities.name: transactions_refund
capabilities.description: Refund a settled transaction fully or partially.

capabilities.name: transactions_search
capabilities.description: Search for transactions by status, amount, date, or other criteria.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a customer in the vault for storing payment methods.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a customer and their vaulted payment methods.

capabilities.name: payment_methods_vault
capabilities.description: Vault a single-use payment method for reuse.

capabilities.name: payment_methods_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a vaulted payment method is valid.

capabilities.name: client_token_create
capabilities.description: Generate a client token for initializing the Braintree client SDK.

capabilities.name: disputes_accept
capabilities.description: Accept a dispute, conceding the amount to the customer.

capabilities.name: disputes_add_evidence
capabilities.description: Add text evidence to contest a dispute.

capabilities.name: disputes_finalize
capabilities.description: Finalize a dispute and submit evidence for review.
